creator: 1wkmmr@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 186626
a patch file to be placed in files directory

Hi,

Compiling the following port ends with error on my 11.1-STABLE amd64 machine. 

 $FreeBSD: head/lang/smalltalk/Makefile 450351 2017-09-22 10:48:28Z mat $

 FreeBSD dhcp34.tmnetwork.local 11.1-STABLE FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE #1 r323841

It looks that the relevant file, tutorial.texi, includes a buggy expression. 

Here, I enclose a patch for workaround.

Please check it out, and commit it if appropriate.

Cheers
